## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? Keep it focused on one logical change. -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123. If there's no issue, briefly explain the motivation. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] 🌍 New/updated locale
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] I followed the project conventions in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
      (pure `domain/`, selectors, CSS Modules, no god render function)
- [ ] User-facing strings go through i18n and exist in **both** `en.json` and `fr.json`
- [ ] I updated the docs (README / relevant files) if behavior changed
- [ ] I added a screenshot / GIF below if this changes the UI
